phaseName: Final Validation, Completion Audit, and Debt Closure

debt.requiredDisposition: Prefer retargeting to existing CP15 acceptance and final-currentness evidence. Create CP15_MERGE_DECISION.md only if it is a derived evidence index, clearly marked not a new decision.
